protocol.name: ID-JAG Simple Flow (Agent-Only)
protocol.description: Identity Assertion JWT Authorization Grant without human delegation. The agent authenticates as itself using a signed JWT assertion.

entities.name: AI Agent
entities.description: Autonomous agent authenticating to access protected resources

entities.name: Assertion Issuer
entities.description: Service that creates and signs JWT identity assertions

entities.name: Authorization Server
entities.description: Validates assertions and issues access tokens

entities.name: JWKS Endpoint
entities.description: Distributes public keys for signature verification

entities.name: Resource Server
entities.description: Hosts protected APIs that require valid access tokens

phases.name: Assertion Creation
phases.description: Agent requests and receives a signed identity assertion

phases.name: Token Exchange
phases.description: Agent exchanges assertion for access token per RFC 8693

phases.name: Resource Access
phases.description: Agent accesses protected resources with Bearer token

flows.label: Request Identity Assertion
flows.description: Agent requests an assertion claiming its own identity

flows.label: Create JWT Claims (iss, sub, aud, exp)
flows.description: Build JWT with issuer, subject (agent ID), audience, and expiration

flows.label: Sign with Private Key (RS256/ES256)
flows.description: Sign the assertion using asymmetric cryptography

flows.label: POST /token (grant_type=token-exchange, subject_token=JWT)
flows.description: Exchange assertion for access token per RFC 8693

flows.label: GET /.well-known/jwks.json
flows.description: Fetch public keys to verify assertion signature

flows.label: Verify Signature + Validate Claims (iss, aud, exp)
flows.description: Cryptographically verify signature and validate all claims

flows.label: Validate Token + Check Scope + Extract Subject
